title.rendered: Travel FX Supports the Take Five Campaign: Keeping You Safe from Financial Fraud

content.rendered:
At Travel FX we understand how important it is to keep your hard-earned money safe from financial fraud that can be prevented while making purchases online, which is why we are proud to support the Take Five campaign—a vital initiative dedicated to raising awareness of financial fraud and how to protect yourself from it.

Take Five is a national campaign led by UK Finance and backed by the government, designed to offer simple and impartial advice that helps prevent financial fraud. This includes scams that take place through email, phone calls, or online platforms, with criminals impersonating trusted organisations in a bid to steal your personal details and money.

As a trusted currency provider, we’re committed to ensuring our customers have the best possible experience with Travel FX, free from the risk of fraud. Unfortunately, criminals are experts at impersonation and can spend hours researching you to carry out their scams. All it takes is one moment of inattention, and they might get away with your money.

That’s why Take Five urges everyone to Stop, Challenge, and Protect.

Stop: Take a Moment to Think

Before you share any personal information or hand over your money, take a moment to stop and think. Are you certain that the request is legitimate? If something doesn’t feel right, don’t be afraid to pause and consider the situation carefully.

Challenge: Could It Be Fake?

Fraudsters often try to rush you into making decisions quickly. If you feel pressured or uncomfortable with any request, don’t hesitate to challenge it. It’s always okay to reject, refuse, or ignore any unsolicited requests. Remember, only criminals will try to force you into acting in haste.

Protect: Keep Yourself Safe

If you think you’ve been targeted by a scam, contact your bank immediately to report it. You can also report the fraud to Action Fraud at actionfraud.police.uk or call them on 0330 123 2040.

For more tips on how to protect yourself from fraud, check out the Take Five website, which is packed with useful advice and information.

At Travel FX, we’re proud to support the Take Five campaign and share their mission to reduce the impact of fraud on consumers across the UK. Stay alert, stay informed, and keep your finances secure.

itemListElement.name: Travel FX Supports the Take Five Campaign: Keeping You Safe from Financial Fraud

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
